# Pricing Strategy — Conductor

**Status:** MISSING from source → Fully Generated (⚡)  
**Source:** None (critical gap — generated by review board)  
**Last Updated:** June 2026

---

## Purpose
Defines how Conductor prices its product, the rationale, tier structure, packaging, and billing mechanics. Pricing is a P0 gap — the platform cannot launch without it.

---

## Pricing Philosophy

**Principle:** Value-based pricing anchored to business outcomes, not features.

The customer's benchmark is not "how much does this software cost?" but rather:
- "My staff spends ₹25,000/month on manual follow-up tasks. Does this cost less?"
- "If this recovers even 2 abandoned carts per week, it pays for itself."

**Positioning:** Conductor should feel **dramatically cheaper than the problem** while being profitable at scale.

---

## Pricing Model: Usage-Gated Subscription

### Primary Dimension: Messages Sent per Month
The most understandable usage metric for SMB customers. Correlates directly to WhatsApp Business API costs (which we absorb up to plan limit, pass through as overage above).

### Secondary Dimensions (plan gates):
- Number of WhatsApp Business Phone Numbers
- Number of Active Workflows
- Number of Platform Users (agents/admins)
- Connector access (3rd-party integrations)
- AI feature access (Phase 2)

---

## Pricing Tiers

### Tier 1: Starter
**Target:** Solo operators, freelancers, very small teams (<5 people)  
**Price:** ₹1,499/month (₹14,990/year — 2 months free)

| Feature | Limit |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp Business Numbers | 1 |
| Monthly Messages | 1,000 |
| Active Workflows | 3 |
| Platform Users | 2 |
| Connectors | 1 (choose 1 from Shopify, Zoho, Razorpay) |
| Templates | 10 |
| Analytics | Basic (last 30 days) |
| AI Features | None |
| Support | Self-serve (docs + community) |

### Tier 2: Growth
**Target:** Growing SMBs, 5–50 employees  
**Price:** ₹4,999/month (₹49,990/year — 2 months free)

| Feature | Limit |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp Business Numbers | 2 |
| Monthly Messages | 10,000 |
| Active Workflows | 20 |
| Platform Users | 10 |
| Connectors | All standard connectors |
| Templates | Unlimited |
| Analytics | Full (all time) + exports |
| AI Features | Intent detection, FAQ bot |
| Support | Email + chat (24h SLA) |
| Extras | Workflow performance reports, campaign analytics |

### Tier 3: Business
**Target:** Established SMBs, multi-location, 50–200 employees  
**Price:** ₹12,999/month (₹1,29,990/year — 2 months free)

| Feature | Limit |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp Business Numbers | 5 |
| Monthly Messages | 50,000 |
| Active Workflows | Unlimited |
| Platform Users | 50 |
| Connectors | All + premium connectors |
| Templates | Unlimited |
| Analytics | Full + custom reports + API access |
| AI Features | All (intent, NLU, recommendations, agent assist) |
| Support | Phone + chat (4h SLA) + dedicated onboarding |
| Extras | White-glove onboarding, SLA guarantee, audit logs |

### Tier 4: Enterprise
**Target:** Multi-location businesses, 200+ employees, resellers  
**Price:** Custom (starting ₹30,000/month)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp Business Numbers | Custom |
| Monthly Messages | Custom (committed volume) |
| Platform Users | Unlimited |
| SLA | 99.9% uptime SLA + penalties |
| Support | Named CSM + 1h response |
| Extras | Custom connectors, white-label, SSO, dedicated infra option |

---

## Overage Pricing

| Plan | Included Messages | Overage Rate |
|---|---|---|
| Starter | 1,000 | ₹0.50 per additional message |
| Growth | 10,000 | ₹0.30 per additional message |
| Business | 50,000 | ₹0.15 per additional message |
| Enterprise | Custom | Negotiated |

**Overage cap:** No automatic cap — customers are notified at 80% and 100% of limit. Option to auto-purchase message packs (₹999 for 5,000 messages on Growth plan).

---

## Free Trial

- **Duration:** 14 days
- **Features:** Growth plan features
- **Message limit:** 500 messages during trial
- **No credit card required at signup** (credit card required at conversion)
- **Trial-to-paid conversion target:** 25%+

---

## Add-On Products ⚡

| Add-On | Price | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Additional WA Number | ₹999/month per number | Beyond plan limit |
| Message Pack (5,000) | ₹999 | One-time overage pack |
| Custom Connector Development | ₹25,000 one-time | Bespoke connector built by Conductor team |
| Onboarding Package | ₹9,999 one-time | 4-session guided setup for Growth customers |
| Vertical Pack | ₹2,999/month | Premium pre-built industry pack (Healthcare, Real Estate, etc.) |

---

## Reseller / Partner Pricing ⚡

| Partner Type | Discount | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Certified Agency Partner | 20% off retail | Manages 5+ clients on platform |
| Strategic Reseller | 30% off retail | Volume commitment, white-label option |
| Technology Partner | Revenue share | Integration partner distributing Conductor |

---

## Pricing Rationale

### Competitive Benchmarking ⚡
| Competitor | Price | Limitations vs Conductor |
|---|---|---|
| WATI | ₹2,499–₹9,999/month | WhatsApp-only, no business capability layer |
| AiSensy | ₹999–₹4,999/month | Broadcast-only, no workflow engine |
| Interakt | ₹3,499–₹7,499/month | Limited connectors, no event-driven architecture |
| Make (Integromat) | ₹1,200–₹7,000/month | Developer-centric, no SMB UX |

**Conductor pricing is at parity or premium to competitors** because:
1. Business Capability Packs deliver faster time-to-value
2. Connector ecosystem is more comprehensive
3. Workflow engine is more powerful than broadcast-only tools

### Why Per-Message and Not Per-User?
- SMBs understand "messages sent" more than "seats"
- Correlates to value delivered (more messages = more automation = more ROI)
- Aligns incentives (Conductor grows revenue as customer succeeds)
- Meta charges per message — this model passes costs transparently

---

## Billing Mechanics

### Billing Cycle
- Monthly billing on the same date as signup
- Annual plans: Annual payment upfront, 2 months free (≈16% discount)

### Payment Methods
- Credit/debit card (Razorpay)
- UPI (Razorpay)
- Bank transfer (annual plans only)
- International: Stripe (future)

### Failed Payment Flow
1. Day 0: Payment fails → Email notification
2. Day 3: Retry → Notification
3. Day 7: Final retry → Feature restriction warning
4. Day 14: Account suspended (data retained for 30 days)
5. Day 44: Account deletion warning
6. Day 60: Data deleted (with DPDP-compliant notice)

---

## Pricing Review Cadence
- Monthly: Monitor conversion rates, churn by plan
- Quarterly: Review overage revenue, upgrade paths
- Annually: Full pricing strategy review against market

## Maintenance Guidance
This is a living document. Update whenever pricing changes. All pricing changes require documentation of the rationale, A/B test results (if any), and impact on existing customers.
